overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character running continuously through an urban environment, transitioning from residential streets to highway overpasses. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, and runs alongside multi-lane roads with moderate traffic under clear midday skies.

events.description: character steps off sidewalk and begins crossing the street
character crosses back onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running along the sidewalk, then crossing the street and continuing on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: teal sedan driving along the residential street

entered.detail: beige multi-story residential buildings with glass balconies and palm trees
tall palm trees lining the residential street
cracked concrete sidewalk with red painted curbs
tall metal street light poles along the road

segments.scene_description: The character begins running along a residential sidewalk next to beige apartment buildings. After crossing the street, the character continues running past parked cars and palm trees in a sunny urban neighborhood.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection and highway overpass approach

events.description: exits residential street and enters large open intersection with traffic lights
turns right to follow the highway overpass sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection and continuing along the highway sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black SUV waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: elevated highway structure with multiple lanes
overhead traffic signal gantry with multiple lights
large commercial billboard with red and white signage
metal highway guard rail along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the residential area into a wide open intersection with traffic lights and billboards. Crossing the intersection, the character turns onto a highway overpass sidewalk with guard rails and views of distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway overpass with heavy traffic and commercial vehicles

events.description: approaches a traffic jam with stopped vehicles on the highway
passes a taco truck stopped on the highway shoulder

agents.ego_description: running along the highway overpass, weaving past pedestrians and alongside dense traffic

notable_agents.action: white taco truck with 'Attack-A-Tacos' branding stopped on the shoulder
large semi-truck moving slowly in the traffic jam

entered.detail: white food truck with yellow and red 'Attack-A-Tacos' signage
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple power lines

segments.scene_description: Running along the highway overpass, the character encounters heavy traffic including a distinctive taco truck and semi-trucks. The scene features prominent electrical transmission towers and highway infrastructure against a backdrop of distant hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with rocky hillside and construction zone

events.description: sidewalk narrows as construction barriers and cones appear on the left

agents.ego_description: running along the highway shoulder next to a steep rocky hillside, passing construction zones

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: steep dirt and rock embankment with sparse dry vegetation
white A-frame construction barricades with red and white stripes
orange traffic cones lining the edge of the narrow sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character running along a narrowing highway shoulder bordered by a steep rocky hillside on the left. Construction barriers and traffic cones line the path as the character continues past sparse pedestrian traffic and utility poles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character runs from a quiet residential neighborhood into a sprawling industrial highway corridor. It begins on a sunny sidewalk beside beige apartment buildings, moving past parked cars and palm trees before crossing a street. As the character emerges from the residential area, the scene opens into a wide intersection with billboards and traffic lights, shifting toward a highway overpass bordered by guard rails and views of distant mountains. The camera then follows the character alongside heavy traffic, passing a taco truck and semi-trucks beneath towering electrical transmission structures. Finally, the environment narrows as the path transitions to a highway shoulder bordered by a steep rocky hillside and lined with construction barriers and traffic cones.
